## Scope check

Pi-mem intentionally excludes some surfaces — see [CLAUDE.md "Out of scope"](../../CLAUDE.md#out-of-scope--do-not-add-unilaterally).
Confirm your proposal is in-scope:

- [ ] Wraps a worker-backed claude-mem HTTP endpoint (`/api/*`), OR
- [ ] Improves an existing pi event handler (inject / capture / preflight), OR
- [ ] Documentation / DX improvement, OR
- [ ] Other (explain why it should be in scope): <!-- ... -->
